caption: Individual-level collision, phase 5 slice 1: two friendly regiments ordered onto the same spot now pack together at the SOLDIER level -- their soldiers press into tight contact instead of the regiments bouncing apart as big circles. Friendly spacing emerges from per-soldier steering plus a soldier->regiment coupling (no teleport); enemy collision and the spear-vs-cavalry hard block are unchanged. The regiment broadphase caches each regiment's block extent once per tick (O(n), not O(n²)) for scalability with large campaign stacks.
